response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Discovered a complete mismatch between the reference JSON lyrics and the actual audio. The video actually features Arknights soundtrack 'Six Feet Under' (originally by TK from Ling tosite sigure) followed by a Persona 3 music medley cover ('A Way of Life', 'Brand New Days', 'Time'), and a live 3D talk segment. 2. JSON Usage: Completely discarded the reference JSON and performed 100% manual transcription and translation of the spoken/sung English vocals. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly synchronized to vocal utterances, preserving precise speech boundaries for both the rapid-fire rap sequences and the casual spoken talk outro segment.
